name: OpenClaw Migration
description: Migrates an OpenClaw user's AgentSkills into Agent Architect's native SKILL.md + config.json format, one-way, with best-effort tool permission mapping

trigger.description: Invoked when the user asks to migrate OpenClaw skills to Agent Architect (e.g., 'migrate my openclaw skills', 'import from openclaw', '/architect migrate-from-openclaw')
